notes: v1.14.133 - ICON SYSTEM Stage 1 v2 (Ref landing fix, per web-Claude master handoff): two corrections to the v1.14.132 ship. (1) ART: the v1 REF webp were cut with baked floor-reflections; replaced all 6 with the v2 set (reflections stripped, transparent, normalized) - extracted from the inlined STANDALONE-FIXED preview build (512x512 PNG, alpha) and re-encoded to real WebP @256 via sharp (10-21KB each). 5 filenames renamed to v2 slugs (optics-burst->optics, hardware-chip->hardware, cli-terminal->cli, hw-barcode->hwref, know-cap->know); compass kept its name, got v2 content. (2) SIZE: the icon was filling the full 96px .rf-cic box (crowded vs the 36px svg Work cards); now .rf-i-img renders at 76px centered in the 96px cell (display:grid;place-items:center) so it breathes. Old 5 v1 REF files deleted from /icons/ (no dead assets); 5 sw.js precache lines renamed to match; compass precache line unchanged. 76px is the tunable knob (~70 air / ~84 presence). Redesign-only (body.rd / #ref-grid); Work cards (4x #ph-* svg) untouched - Stage 2. node --check sw.js, CSS brace gate, three-stamp lockstep. DEVICE-VERIFY (gloved, cold-aisle): open a v2 webp URL directly (confirm 200 not 404), close+reopen app, reload, confirm v1.14.133 stamp, then REF - 6 icons breathe (not filling card), no reflections, Work unchanged; Airplane Mode + reload = all icons still paint (precache proof); add ?legacy=1 = 5-tab legacy unchanged. ORIG v1.14.132 notes: wired branded WebP onto the 6 Ref cards replacing #ph-* SVG; new /icons/ folder + 17-file batch in sw.js precache; .rf-i-img rule + 96px container.
